source_policy: Use official manufacturer pages, press kits, configurators, licensed/Creative Commons media, or screenshots captured from official pages. Do not scrape and reuse random copyrighted photos just by giving credit.

entries.theme: 3 wild facts about Ferrari's first EV
entries.research_need: Official Ferrari page or press release plus one reputable car-news source.

entries.theme: Ferrari made an ultra-expensive EV-looking flagship; would you buy it?
entries.story_tone: comment-bait but factual, no fake claims
entries.research_need: Official pricing/configurator if available; otherwise cite estimated price clearly as estimated.

entries.theme: This used Lexus is cheaper than a new Corolla, but here's the catch
entries.research_need: Live listing data, mileage, title status, comparable market prices, and a disclaimer that prices change.

entries.theme: The new Ferrari Manuale is not actually manual; here's how it works
entries.research_need: Official specs plus reputable automotive reporting.

entries.theme: Why Ferrari fans are arguing about the Luce
entries.story_tone: dramatic but fair, no rage bait without source support
entries.research_need: Official model details plus community/review sentiment from reputable sources.

entries.theme: The fake clutch pedal feature people either love or hate
entries.research_need: Official feature description or credible hands-on reporting.
